locations.witcher_guild_hall: Witcher Guild Hall – A hidden place where witchers gather to take on contracts and discuss their work.
locations.royal_palace: Royal Palace – The seat of power where kings debate the fate of the mountain's gold.

items.witcher_sigil: Witcher Sigil – A symbol of the witcher's authority and protection.
items.mountain_whisper: Mountain Whisper – A mysterious artifact that whispers promises of gold to those who listen.

characters.witcher_master: Witcher Master – The leader of the witcher guild who oversees the investigation.
characters.king_of_novigrad: King of Novigrad – A ruler who seeks control over the mountain's gold.

action_text.unlock-path: I unlock a new path from ${from} to ${to} with ${item}.
